creator: mikhail.maximov@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Michele Possamai from comment #20)

> I fail to see how the LTS versions of Linux matter to the salt port on FreeBSD.

Well, if you have a single Salt master on a FreeBSD server and need to control cattle that are Linux-based...
There are servers/switches/other "embedded" stuff where you may not have a luxury to update software.
TBH, I'm guessing from my past experience...
